---
title: "Compute"
---

The compute page tracks proof-carrying circular computation, CoilRay, sampling, layout, stencil, NTT, and systems applications.

The current CoilLayout fixtures validate deterministic layout and periodic-stencil outputs before timing or backend claims. `COMPL-B0001` and `COMPL-B0002` are executable expected-output coverage, not performance claims.

::: {.learning-unit}

## Case-Study Frame

The circular address spaces here are cyclic memory addresses, direction bins, stride layouts, and schedule slots. The repeated action is a stride or round-robin step. The checked seed says the finite address arithmetic behaves; it does not say the implementation is faster.

:::

## What To Notice

- Proof-carrying computation starts with address safety and closure.
- Layout and stencil fixtures check deterministic outputs before performance tests.
- MLX/Mac work should remain explicit when local acceleration is discussed.

::: {.checkpoint-box}

## Checkpoint

What is the difference between proving a cyclic address wraps correctly and proving a compute kernel is fast?

:::

## Source Trail

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPC-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPC-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPR-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPR-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPL-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPL-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPS-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="COMPS-T0004"></div>

<div class="dictionary-box" data-dictionary-id="COMMON-0040"></div>
<div class="dictionary-box" data-dictionary-id="COMMON-0045"></div>

<p data-paper-ref="papers/applications/PAPER_COMP_01_PROOF_CARRYING_CIRCULAR_COMPUTATION.md">Proof-carrying compute paper: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_COMP_01_PROOF_CARRYING_CIRCULAR_COMPUTATION.md">Circular Computation</a></p>
<p data-paper-ref="papers/applications/PAPER_COMP_03_COIL_LAYOUT_STENCIL_NTT.md">Layout paper: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_COMP_03_COIL_LAYOUT_STENCIL_NTT.md">Coil Layout, Stencil, And NTT</a></p>

::: {.warning-box}
Benchmark fixtures are executable references only. They do not prove cache locality, stencil correctness, FFT/NTT correctness, or backend speed.
:::

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
